auth.subtitle: Sign in with your household account to see the shared leftovers dashboard.
auth.scaffoldTitle: Foundation and auth are in place
auth.scaffoldSummary: Scaffolding, app shell routing, PocketBase auth wiring, PWA assets, and container files are ready for the dashboard data layer.

dashboard.title: Fridge
dashboard.headline: Track what needs attention before it turns into waste.
dashboard.body: Active leftovers are sorted by expiry date so the next thing to use is always at the top.
dashboard.emptyState: No leftovers! Your fridge is clear.
dashboard.loadErrorBody: The dashboard could not load leftovers right now. Check the PocketBase connection and try again.

addItem.title: Add Leftover
addItem.cameraHint: Use capture for a quick fridge shot, or upload one from your library.
addItem.cameraUnavailable: Camera access is unavailable. You can still upload a photo from your device.
addItem.fileFallback: Add a photo from your camera roll or file picker.
addItem.captureError: That photo could not be processed. Try another image or upload again.
addItem.saveError: The leftover could not be saved right now. Try again.
addItem.customDaysLabel: How many days will this last?

stats.title: Stats
stats.headline: See how often leftovers are saved versus wasted.
stats.body: Track completed leftovers over the last week, month, or your full history to spot waste patterns in the household.
stats.ratioBody: Based on leftovers marked finished in the selected period.
stats.loadErrorBody: The stats view could not load completed leftovers right now. Check the PocketBase connection and try again.
stats.emptyBody: Once items are marked as eaten or wasted, this view will show the totals and ratio for the selected period.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.promptBody: Get notified before your food expires
notifications.iosHint: Add Scraps to your Home Screen to enable notifications

pantry.title: Pantry
pantry.headline: Track what's in your kitchen before it runs out.
pantry.emptyHint: Tap the + button to add your first item.
pantry.addMethodPrompt: How would you like to add an item?
pantry.methodManualHint: Type the name and pick a category.
pantry.methodBarcodeHint: Use your camera to scan a product barcode.
pantry.methodAiHint: Take a photo and let AI identify the product.
pantry.saveError: Could not save the item. Try again.
